questionHtml: Discuss the evidence provided in the bar chart for the hypothesis that plant leaves use up starch reserves for cell respiration during the night.
markschemeHtml:
a. lower starch levels at end of night in all stages 

b. lower starch levels at end of night in both plants grown in short day and long days

c. no evidence that starch is being used for respiration
OR
starch may have been exported/stored in other tissues/example tissue «rather than used in respiration»

meta.title: Discuss the evidence provided in the bar chart for the hypothesis that plant leaves use up starch reserves for cell respiration during the night.
